zh.lifeSummary: 當Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench於大約1522年出生在英國越可爾加格拉福時，他的父親Lord Christopher Shute18歲，母親Joane Porter20歲。他於大約1555年與Thomasine Burgoyne在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年4月在英國坎布利其爾歐艾金頓享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench于大约1522年出生在英国越可爾加格拉福时，他的父亲Lord Christopher Shute18岁，母亲Joane Porter20岁。他于大约1555年与Thomasine Burgoyne在英国英格兰坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1590年4月在英国坎布利其爾歐艾金頓享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from any of several places called with Middle English shute, Old English scīete ‘projecting piece of land’ (often in the corner of a parish), in particular those in Devon, which include Shute near Axminster, Shute in Kelly, Shute in Ugborough, Shute in Shobrooke, Shute Farm in Bishopsteignton, and Shewte in Bovey Tracy. Other sources of the surname may include Shute Farm in Longbridge Deverill and Shute Farm in Donhead Saint Mary (both Wiltshire).
In some cases also an Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Šute, and probably also of its cognate Šutej (see Shutey ). Compare Shutte and Schutte .

variants.name: Shutes
meanings: English: variant of Shute , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Shutt
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English schut(te), schit(te) ‘archer’ (Old English scytta, a derivative of scēotan ‘to shoot’). Compare Shutter .
Americanized form of German   Schutt   or   Schott  .

variants.name: Shutey
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Šutej: nickname derived from Croatian (and possibly also Slovenian dialect) šut ‘without horns/ears’, also ‘mutilated, lame’, or perhaps from a derivative of Croatian šutjeti ‘to be silent’, Slovenian dialect šut(l)ati ‘to work silently’. Compare Shute and Schutte .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench was born about 1522, in Gargrave, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord Christopher Shute, was 18 and his mother, Joane Porter, was 20. He married Thomasine Burgoyne about 1555, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died in April 1590, in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench est né environ 1522, à Gargrave, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord Christopher Shute, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joane Porter, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Burgoyne environ 1555, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1590, à Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench um 1522 in Gargrave, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Christopher Shute 18 und seine Mutter Joane Porter 20. Er hat um 1555 in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Thomasine Burgoyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im April 1590 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench è nato il circa 1522 nel Gargrave, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Christopher Shute, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Joane Porter, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Burgoyne circa 1555, nel Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1590, nel Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Benchが約1522年にイギリスヨークシュアイアガーグラブで生まれた時，父Lord Christopher Shuteは18歳，母Joane Porterは20歳であった。約1555年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンでThomasine Burgoyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年4月にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアオアキントンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench(이)가 대략 1522년 영국 요르크실르 가그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Christopher Shute(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Porter(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1555년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 Thomasine Burgoyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 4월 영국 캄브리지실르 킨그턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench nasceu aproximadamente 1522, em Gargrave, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Christopher Shute, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joane Porter, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Burgoyne aproximadamente 1555, em Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1590, em Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench родился около 1522 г. в местности гарграв, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Christopher Shute было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Porter, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Burgoyne около 1555 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер апрель 1590 г. в местности оакингтон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench nació aproximadamente 1522, en Gargrave, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Christopher Shute, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Joane Porter, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomasine Burgoyne aproximadamente 1555, en Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en abril de 1590, en Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
